checks.observed: manifest.webmanifest returned JSON with dir=rtl, display=standalone, start_url, icons, theme_color.
sw.js active; navigator.serviceWorker.controller non-null after load.

Zero /api/ URLs found in CacheStorage caches.
After returning online, pages/assets loaded without cache errors in console.
No unhandled console errors during online phases.
Offline cached home retained lang=he and heading text.
Offline-rendered page showed Hebrew copy without raw keys.
